summary: Normalized Skill Ops rule digests across CRLF/LF, synced skill-store mirror, and cleared 2026-06-23 Skill Ops drift.
issues: Skill Ops false-positive drift from line-ending-only differences in agents/openai.yaml
lessons: Skill-store governance digests should ignore CRLF/LF-only differences while preserving file/path/content checks.
reusable_rules: Normalize CRLF to LF before hashing governed skill rule assets.
